Bash(node -e "const kb = require\('./server/data/knowledge-base.json'\); console.log\('Valid JSON'\); console.log\('Top-level keys:', Object.keys\(kb\)\); console.log\('Assistance programs:', kb.assistance_programs.programs.length\); console.log\('Has assistance_finder_tool:', !!kb.assistance_programs.assistance_finder_tool\); console.log\('STEP rebates:', kb.energy_savings.programs.step_program.residential_rebates.length\); console.log\('Has demand_response:', !!kb.energy_savings.programs.demand_response_program\); console.log\('Has online_tools:', !!kb.energy_savings.online_tools\); console.log\('Has reconnect_service:', !!kb.start_stop_transfer.reconnect_service\); console.log\('Has toll_free:', !!kb.contact_info.phone_numbers.residential_customer_service.toll_free\); console.log\('Has hearing_impaired:', !!kb.contact_info.phone_numbers.hearing_impaired\); console.log\('Has email:', !!kb.contact_info.email\); console.log\('Has night_deposit_boxes:', !!kb.contact_info.night_deposit_boxes\); console.log\('REAP amount:', kb.assistance_programs.programs[0].assistance_amount\); console.log\('REAP income:', kb.assistance_programs.programs[0].eligibility[1]\); console.log\('Service area snippet:', kb.contact_info.service_area.substring\(0, 100\)\);")

Bash(node -e 'const kb = require\("./server/data/knowledge-base.json"\); console.log\("Valid JSON"\); console.log\("Top keys:", Object.keys\(kb\).join\(", "\)\); console.log\("Assistance programs:", kb.assistance_programs.programs.length\); console.log\("Has assistance_finder_tool:", Boolean\(kb.assistance_programs.assistance_finder_tool\)\); console.log\("STEP rebates:", kb.energy_savings.programs.step_program.residential_rebates.length\); console.log\("Has demand_response:", Boolean\(kb.energy_savings.programs.demand_response_program\)\); console.log\("Has online_tools:", Boolean\(kb.energy_savings.online_tools\)\); console.log\("Has reconnect_service:", Boolean\(kb.start_stop_transfer.reconnect_service\)\); console.log\("Toll-free:", kb.contact_info.phone_numbers.residential_customer_service.toll_free\); console.log\("Hearing impaired:", kb.contact_info.phone_numbers.hearing_impaired.number\); console.log\("Email:", kb.contact_info.email.general\); console.log\("Night deposit:", kb.contact_info.night_deposit_boxes\); console.log\("REAP amount:", kb.assistance_programs.programs[0].assistance_amount\); console.log\("REAP income:", kb.assistance_programs.programs[0].eligibility[1]\); console.log\("Service area \(100ch\):", kb.contact_info.service_area.substring\(0, 100\)\); console.log\("Billing hours:", kb.contact_info.phone_numbers.residential_customer_service.hours\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { getSystemPrompt } = require\("./server/prompts/system-prompt"\); const p = getSystemPrompt\(\); console.log\("Prompt length:", p.length, "chars"\); console.log\("Contains Casa Verde:", p.includes\("Casa Verde"\)\); console.log\("Contains WRAP:", p.includes\("WRAP"\)\); console.log\("Contains Assistance Finder:", p.includes\("Assistance Finder"\)\); console.log\("Contains demand response:", p.includes\("Demand Response"\)\); console.log\("Contains reconnect:", p.includes\("econnect"\)\); console.log\("Contains 950,000:", p.includes\("950,000"\)\); console.log\("Contains toll-free:", p.includes\("800-870-1006"\)\); console.log\("Contains hearing:", p.includes\("210-353-2224"\)\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { getSystemPrompt } = require\("./server/prompts/system-prompt"\); const p = getSystemPrompt\(\); console.log\("Prompt length:", p.length, "chars"\); const checks = [ ["Casa Verde", p.includes\("Casa Verde"\)], ["WRAP", p.includes\("WRAP"\)], ["Assistance Finder", p.includes\("Assistance Finder"\)], ["Demand Response", p.includes\("Demand Response"\)], ["Reconnect", p.includes\("Reconnect Service"\)], ["950,000", p.includes\("950,000"\)], ["389,000", p.includes\("389,000"\)], ["Toll-free 800-870-1006", p.includes\("800-870-1006"\)], ["Hearing 210-353-2224", p.includes\("210-353-2224"\)], ["Email customerservice@", p.includes\("customerservice@cpsenergy.com"\)], ["Night deposit", p.includes\("Night deposit"\)], ["REAP $1,200", p.includes\("1,200"\)], ["REAP 150% FPL", p.includes\("150% of the Federal Poverty Level"\)], ["REAP twice per year", p.includes\("twice per calendar year"\)], ["210-353-4483", p.includes\("210-353-4483"\)], ["210-335-3666", p.includes\("210-335-3666"\)], ["ADP electricity AND gas", p.includes\("electricity and natural gas"\)], ["ADP age 60+", p.includes\("age 60"\)], ["Cool Roof $0.20/sq ft", p.includes\("0.20 per square foot"\)], ["Pool Pump $150/hp", p.includes\("150 per horsepower"\)], ["Mini-Split $100-275", p.includes\("100-$275 per ton"\)], ["FREE Home Energy Assessment", p.includes\("Home Energy Assessment"\)], ["FREE AC Tune-Up", p.includes\("High-Performance A/C Tune-Up"\)], ["LED instant discount", p.includes\("Instant discount"\)], ["resi-savenow.cpsenergy.com", p.includes\("resi-savenow.cpsenergy.com"\)], ["savenow@cpsenergy.com", p.includes\("savenow@cpsenergy.com"\)], ["My Energy Portal", p.includes\("My Energy Portal"\)], ["Energy Cost Calculator", p.includes\("Energy Cost Calculator"\)], ["Senior Late Fee Waiver", p.includes\("Senior Late Fee Waiver"\)], ["6:45 PM Wednesdays", p.includes\("6:45 PM on Wednesdays"\)], ["Sat 8am-5pm", p.includes\("Saturday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM"\)], ["$9.6B revenue", p.includes\("9.6 billion"\)], ["#1 solar Texas", p.includes\("#1 in Texas for solar"\)], ["1860 established", p.includes\("1860"\)], ["Franklin Energy", p.includes\("Franklin Energy"\)], ["29,000 customers used", p.includes\("29,000"\)] ]; let pass = 0; let fail = 0; checks.forEach\(\([label, result]\) => { if \(result\) { pass++; } else { fail++; console.log\("MISSING:", label\); } }\); console.log\("Passed:", pass + "/" + checks.length\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { getSystemPrompt } = require\("./server/prompts/system-prompt"\); const p = getSystemPrompt\(\); console.log\("Prompt length:", p.length, "chars\\n"\); const checks = [ ["=== IDENTITY ===", p.includes\("=== IDENTITY ==="\)], ["=== BEHAVIOR RULES ===", p.includes\("=== BEHAVIOR RULES ==="\)], ["=== KNOWLEDGE BASE ===", p.includes\("=== KNOWLEDGE BASE ==="\)], ["950,000 electric", p.includes\("950,000 electric"\)], ["389,000 natural gas", p.includes\("389,000 natural gas"\)], ["Established 1860", p.includes\("1860"\)], ["NOT a human / AI assistant", p.includes\("You are NOT a human"\)], ["Bilingual EN/ES auto-detect", p.includes\("Automatically detect the language"\)], ["Rule 1 empathetic", p.includes\("BE EMPATHETIC FIRST"\)], ["Rule 2 fallback 210-353-2222", p.includes\("210-353-2222 \(residential\)"\)], ["Rule 2 fallback 210-353-3333", p.includes\("210-353-3333 \(commercial\)"\)], ["Rule 3 never request OR store PII", p.includes\("NEVER REQUEST OR STORE"\)], ["Rule 4 emergency 210-353-4357", p.includes\("210-353-4357"\)], ["Rule 4 do NOT troubleshoot", p.includes\("Do not troubleshoot"\)], ["Rule 5 CPS topics only", p.includes\("STAY ON CPS ENERGY TOPICS"\)], ["Rule 6 concise 2-4 sentences", p.includes\("2-4 sentences"\)], ["Rule 7 bullet lists", p.includes\("USE BULLET LISTS"\)], ["Rule 8 specific phone/URL", p.includes\("ALWAYS PROVIDE SPECIFIC CONTACT"\)], ["Rule 9 acknowledge frustration", p.includes\("ACKNOWLEDGE FRUSTRATION"\)], ["Rule 10 Assistance Finder AND REAP", p.includes\("ASSISTANCE FINDER AND REAP FIRST"\)], ["Rule 11 outage num + map", p.includes\("outagemap.cpsenergy.com"\)], ["Rule 12 never google or non-CPS", p.includes\("LINK NON-CPS SITES"\)], ["Rule 13 dont ask anything else every time", p.includes\("Do not robotically ask"\)], ["KB section headers use ---", p.includes\("--- BILLING AND PAYMENTS ---"\)], ["All 13 rules numbered", p.includes\("13. END CONVERSATIONS"\)] ]; let pass = 0; checks.forEach\(\([label, result]\) => { if \(result\) { pass++; } else { console.log\("FAIL:", label\); } }\); console.log\("Passed:", pass + "/" + checks.length\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { getSystemPrompt } = require\("./server/prompts/system-prompt"\); const p = getSystemPrompt\(\); const sections = p.match\(/^===.+===$/gm\); const subsections = p.match\(/^---.+---$/gm\); console.log\("Top-level sections:", sections\); console.log\("\\nKB subsections:", subsections\);')
